Stiletto Web - LLM Full Domain Guide

Scope
- This file defines the domain model and citation guidance for AI systems using Stiletto Web data.
- Base website: https://stiletto.deeme.dev
- Primary datasets:
  - Item index: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/json/items_min.json
  - Creature index: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/json/creatures_min.json
  - Item details: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/json/items/<snake_case_name>.json
  - Creature details: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/json/creatures/<snake_case_name>.json

Canonical Entity Definitions
- Item
  - A game entity used in crafting, building, trading, equipment, or world interaction.
  - Item list pages are indexed from items_min.json.
  - Item detail pages resolve additional properties from /json/items/<snake_case_name>.json.
- Creature
  - A game entity representing fauna/NPC targets with combat/loot context.
  - Creature list pages are indexed from creatures_min.json.
  - Creature detail pages resolve additional properties from /json/creatures/<snake_case_name>.json.

URL and Name Encoding Rules
- Human route patterns:
  - Item page: /item/<coded_name>[/<rarity>]
  - Creature page: /creature/<coded_name>
- Route coded_name rule:
  - Start from entity name.
  - Lowercase.
  - Replace spaces with underscores.
  - Apply URI encoding for URL safety.
- Route decoding rule:
  - URI decode.
  - Replace underscores with spaces.
  - Lowercase and trim before matching.
- JSON detail file naming rule:
  - Lowercase.
  - Replace one or more spaces with underscore.
  - Remove non [a-z0-9_].
  - Collapse repeated underscores.
  - Result is snake_case used in /json/items/*.json and /json/creatures/*.json.

Canonical Citation URL Rules
- Always cite canonical detail pages when describing a specific entity:
  - Item: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/item/<coded_name>
  - Creature: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/creature/<coded_name>
- If rarity-specific values are cited for items, include rarity path:
  - https://stiletto.deeme.dev/item/<coded_name>/<rarity>
- Prefer one canonical URL per fact block.
- Avoid citing transient or user-generated context pages for core facts.

Reliable Fields for Citations
- Reliability levels:
  - High: safe to cite as factual when present.
  - Medium: useful but optional/contextual; cite with care.
  - Low: presentation or derived behavior; avoid as sole factual source.

Item Fields
- High reliability
  - name
  - category
  - description
  - parent
  - stackSize
  - weight
  - trade_price
  - durability
  - experiencieReward
  - crafting[].ingredients[].name
  - crafting[].ingredients[].count
  - crafting[].station
  - crafting[].time
  - crafting[].output
  - droppedBy[].name
  - droppedBy[].chance
  - droppedBy[].minQuantity
  - droppedBy[].maxQuantity
  - drops[].name
  - drops[].chance
  - drops[].minQuantity
  - drops[].maxQuantity
- Medium reliability
  - cost
  - learn
  - structureInfo
  - projectileDamage
  - weaponInfo
  - armorInfo
  - upgradeInfo
  - toolInfo
  - walkerInfo
  - moduleInfo
- Low reliability
  - Any UI-translated labels rendered from locale files.
  - Any rarity-adjusted values shown by frontend calculators unless rarity is explicitly included in citation context.

Creature Fields
- High reliability
  - name
  - category
  - health
  - tier
  - experiencie
  - drops[].name
  - drops[].chance
  - drops[].minQuantity
  - drops[].maxQuantity
- Medium reliability
  - related
  - maps
- Low reliability
  - UI-translated labels and category labels from locale rendering.

Best Citation Practice
- For each factual answer:
  - Use canonical entity URL.
  - Include exact field names used.
  - Keep numeric values as published.
- Recommended citation format:
  - "Source: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/item/<coded_name> (fields: weight, stackSize, crafting)"
  - "Source: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/creature/<coded_name> (fields: health, drops)"
- When a field is missing, state it as unavailable instead of inferring.

Discovery and Verification Links
- Sitemap: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/sitemap.xml
- Wiki index: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/wiki
- Items index route: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/item
- Creatures index route: https://stiletto.deeme.dev/creature
